title: Age Verification Required For Some GTA Online Players Next Week
body: After being leaked many months ago, age verification will be required for some GTA Online players next week. We previously reported on how Rockstar Games had built age purification systems into GTA On...

title: Take-Two Reaffirms November 19, 2026 Launch Date
body: During their February 2026 earnings call, Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick confirmed that GTA 6 remains on track for its November 19, 2026 release on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. Zelnick described the game as 'the most ambitious interactive entertainment ever created' and said the marketing campaign will begin in Summer 2026.

title: Second Delay Announced — Date Moved to November 2026
body: Take-Two announced during their November 2025 earnings call that GTA 6 would be delayed from May 26, 2026 to November 19, 2026. The reason given was additional polish and quality assurance time. Take-Two stock dropped approximately 10% on the news. The delay reportedly cost the company up to $500 million in lost revenue and additional development costs.

title: Trailer 2 Drops — Jason Confirmed, New Map Areas Revealed
body: Rockstar released GTA 6 Trailer 2 on May 6, 2025. It broke all previous records with 475 million views in 24 hours. The trailer confirmed Jason Duval as the male protagonist alongside Lucia, revealed new map areas including the Keys, Grassrivers, and Port Gellhorn, and set a release date of May 26, 2026 (later delayed). The song featured was Hot Together by The Pointer Sisters.

title: GTA 6 Officially Announced — Trailer 1 Shatters Records
body: Rockstar Games released GTA 6 Trailer 1 on December 5, 2023, ahead of the originally planned schedule after it leaked. The trailer accumulated 271 million views in its first 24 hours — making it the most-watched gaming trailer of all time. Vice City, the state of Leonida, and Lucia as the first female GTA protagonist were all confirmed. The song was Love Is a Long Road by Tom Petty.
